'''√dh-l-t''' ('''dhalata''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pep|pep]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-l-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pep|pep]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √dh-l-t
|-
! Lemma
| dhalata
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhalatithi|dhalatithi]] || [[word:dhalatiji|dhalatiji]] || [[word:dhalatishi|dhalatishi]] || [[word:dhalati|dhalati]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhalatuthuth|dhalatuthuth]] || [[word:dhalatujuj|dhalatujuj]] || [[word:dhalatushush|dhalatushush]] || [[word:dhalat|dhalat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhalatuthu|dhalatuthu]] || [[word:dhalatuju|dhalatuju]] || [[word:dhalatushu|dhalatushu]] || [[word:dhalatu|dhalatu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhalatufuth|dhalatufuth]] || [[word:dhalatufuj|dhalatufuj]] || [[word:dhalatufush|dhalatufush]] || [[word:dhalatuf|dhalatuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhalatethe|dhalatethe]] || [[word:dhalateje|dhalateje]] || [[word:dhalateshe|dhalateshe]] || [[word:dhalate|dhalate]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhalatothoth|dhalatothoth]] || [[word:dhalatojoj|dhalatojoj]] || [[word:dhalatoshosh|dhalatoshosh]] || [[word:dhalat|dhalat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhalatotho|dhalatotho]] || [[word:dhalatojo|dhalatojo]] || [[word:dhalatosho|dhalatosho]] || [[word:dhalato|dhalato]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhalatofoth|dhalatofoth]] || [[word:dhalatofoj|dhalatofoj]] || [[word:dhalatofosh|dhalatofosh]] || [[word:dhalatof|dhalatof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhalatïf|dhalatïf]] || [[word:dhalatïf|dhalatïf]] || [[word:dhalatïf|dhalatïf]] || [[word:dhalatïf|dhalatïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhalatïfïf|dhalatïfïf]] || [[word:dhalatïfïf|dhalatïfïf]] || [[word:dhalatïfïf|dhalatïfïf]] || [[word:dhalatïfïf|dhalatïfïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhalatïf|dhalatïf]] || [[word:dhalatïf|dhalatïf]] || [[word:dhalatïf|dhalatïf]] || [[word:dhalatïf|dhalatïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhalatïf|dhalatïf]] || [[word:dhalatïf|dhalatïf]] || [[word:dhalatïf|dhalatïf]] || [[word:dhalatïf|dhalatïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhalatæthæ|dhalatæthæ]] || [[word:dhalatæjæ|dhalatæjæ]] || [[word:dhalatæshæ|dhalatæshæ]] || [[word:dhalatæ|dhalatæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhalatathath|dhalatathath]] || [[word:dhalatajaj|dhalatajaj]] || [[word:dhalatashash|dhalatashash]] || [[word:dhalat|dhalat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhalatatha|dhalatatha]] || [[word:dhalataja|dhalataja]] || [[word:dhalatasha|dhalatasha]] || [[word:dhalata|dhalata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhalatafath|dhalatafath]] || [[word:dhalatafaj|dhalatafaj]] || [[word:dhalatafash|dhalatafash]] || [[word:dhalataf|dhalataf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dhalatasha|dhalatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godhalatasha|godhalatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidhalatasha|gokidhalatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhalatnüsha|dhalatnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godhalatnknüsha|godhalatnknüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidhalatnüsha|gokidhalatnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhalatshësha|dhalatshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhalatnkshësha|godhalatnkshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhalatshësha|gokidhalatshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhalatrosha|dhalatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhalatnkrosha|godhalatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhalatrosha|gokidhalatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhalatmusha|dhalatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godhalatnkmusha|godhalatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhalatmusha|gokidhalatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dhalatsherasha|dhalatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godhalatnksherasha|godhalatnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidhalatsherasha|gokidhalatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dhalatngasha|dhalatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godhalatnkngasha|godhalatnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidhalatngasha|gokidhalatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhalatyasha|dhalatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godhalatnkyasha|godhalatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidhalatyasha|gokidhalatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dhalatyamasha|dhalatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godhalatnkyamasha|godhalatnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidhalatyamasha|gokidhalatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhalatnüshësha|dhalatnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhalatnknüshësha|godhalatnknüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhalatnüshësha|gokidhalatnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhalatnürosha|dhalatnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhalatnknürosha|godhalatnknürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhalatnürosha|gokidhalatnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhalatnümusha|dhalatnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhalatnknümusha|godhalatnknümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhalatnümusha|gokidhalatnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhalatshënüsha|dhalatshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhalatnkshënüsha|godhalatnkshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhalatshënüsha|gokidhalatshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhalatshërosha|dhalatshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhalatnkshërosha|godhalatnkshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhalatshërosha|gokidhalatshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhalatshëmusha|dhalatshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhalatnkshëmusha|godhalatnkshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhalatshëmusha|gokidhalatshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhalatronüsha|dhalatronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhalatnkronüsha|godhalatnkronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhalatronüsha|gokidhalatronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhalatroshësha|dhalatroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhalatnkroshësha|godhalatnkroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhalatroshësha|gokidhalatroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhalatromusha|dhalatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhalatnkromusha|godhalatnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhalatromusha|gokidhalatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhalatmunüsha|dhalatmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhalatnkmunüsha|godhalatnkmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhalatmunüsha|gokidhalatmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhalatmushësha|dhalatmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhalatnkmushësha|godhalatnkmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhalatmushësha|gokidhalatmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhalatmurosha|dhalatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhalatnkmurosha|godhalatnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhalatmurosha|gokidhalatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dhalat|dhalat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:dhælæt|dhælæt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodhalat|hodhalat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hodhælæt|hodhælæt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodhalat|hohodhalat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodhælæt|hohodhælæt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nüdhalat|nüdhalat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nüdhælæt|nüdhælæt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüdhalat|nünüdhalat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüdhælæt|nünüdhælæt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nïdhalat|nïdhalat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nïdhælæt|nïdhælæt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïdhalat|nïnïdhalat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïdhælæt|nïnïdhælæt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludhalat|ludhalat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ludhælæt|ludhælæt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludhalat|luludhalat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludhælæt|luludhælæt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidhalat|lidhalat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lidhælæt|lidhælæt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidhalat|lilidhalat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidhælæt|lilidhælæt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodhalat|kodhalat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kodhælæt|kodhælæt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodhalat|kokodhalat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodhælæt|kokodhælæt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedhalat|kedhalat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kedhælæt|kedhælæt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedhalat|kekedhalat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedhælæt|kekedhælæt]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
